Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/svyazi-2-0/architecture/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "architecture"
tags:
  * svyazi-2-0
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. architecture

_Файлов:_ 7

h2. Содержание

* [[card-envelope|card-envelope.md]] — 
* [[evidence-envelope|evidence-envelope.md]] — 
* [[gaps|gaps.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[integration-spec|integration-spec.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[memory-write-policy|memory-write-policy.md]] — 
* [[review-record|review-record.md]] — 
* [[skill-tool-policy|skill-tool-policy.md]] —

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.17)

* [[README]] (сходство 0.15)
